prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built EJ22T (closed-deck block, forged internals by Tomei or Manley) with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L, paired with a Tomei 272° camshaft set and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping

Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco Type-RS limited-slip differential (2-way), a PPG straight-cut gearset (1.5:1 final drive ratio) for the 5-speed manual transmission, and a lightweight aluminum flywheel by Exedy (single-mass, 8.5kg)

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (adjustable damping, 20-way compression/rebound), Cusco front and rear sway bars (22mm front, 18mm rear), and spherical bearing subframe collars by Whiteline to eliminate flex in the GC8-derived chassis
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Version 3 widebody kit (Libero-specific fitment) with carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Gloss Black wrap with matte gunmetal accents on the roof and hood

JDM-spec Seibon carbon fiber hood (Libero-specific cutouts for EJ22T intercooler piping) with a custom vented heat extractor design, and a rear spoiler by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 3-inch rise) for balanced downforce

OEM+ interior refresh with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (Libero-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (perforated leather), and a full digital gauge cluster by Defi (Link series, 60mm boost/fuel pressure/oil temp gauges) integrated into the center console
